name: Level Up Golf
address: 1058 N Redwood Rd, Saratoga Springs, UT 84045
about: Level Up Golf is a facility centered around TrackMan 4 technology, offering golf simulation experiences for various player types. The venue provides an opportunity to play golf at any time of day or night with 1-hour tee times, avoiding the need for a full 3-6 hour commitment. It is equipped with state-of-the-art TrackMan 4 simulators that deliver rich data and feedback aimed at improving one's golf game. The facility is designed to accommodate everyone from beginners and average players to experienced golfers and business professionals seeking a client meeting venue.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan 4 simulator with dual radar technology for accurate data tracking
Convenient 1-hour tee times available 24/7 for flexible scheduling
Rich data and feedback critical for improving golf game performance

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB allowed, bringing your own food is permitted
BYOB allowed, bringing your own drinks is permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: Equipped with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (camera/radar hybrid) and Dual Radar Technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You will need to bring your own clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and food are allowed at the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A round of golf takes approximately 1 hour with their tee time system.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is super nice and is welcoming to all, including those who don't golf much, making it a fun activity for families.
